# Fixture: apo structure / family type fields

Exercises the "Apo structure:", "Apo chain:", and "Family type:" fields on a
Protein block, consumed by `compare-sse`.

Settings:
Output folder: ./boltz_yamls
Predict affinity: no

Protein: TESTR
Sequence: MDILCEENTSLSSTTNSLMQLNDDTRLYSNDFNSGEANTSDAFNWTVDSENRT
Apo structure: reference/testr_apo.pdb
Apo chain: A
Family type: gpcr

Ligand: LIG1
SMILES: CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O
